quote: I have never coached an athlete who consistently pushed herself as hard as Isla. She is the type of clutch athlete every coach trusts for critical situations, because you know she will always give her absolute best whether competing individually or contributing to a relay. She genuinely celebrates others' successes, leads by example, and consistently demonstrates the maturity and selflessness that every coach wants in a team leader.
name: Savannah Brady
title: Head Track Coach & Assistant Cross Country Coach, Highlands High School | 2024–2025
fullLetter:
I am honored to recommend Isla Meyn to continue her academic and athletic career at the university level. I have known Isla for four years, having first taught her in 7th grade language arts and later serving as her coach in cross country, indoor track, and outdoor track.

Isla joined the cross country team her freshman year with no prior experience competing in any sports. However, her inner drive and toughness allowed her to quickly adapt to the physical and mental demands of competitive distance running, making it immediately clear that Isla had the qualities of a champion. Even during the most difficult workouts when her exhaustion was visible, quitting or slowing down genuinely never seemed to be an option to her, which is rare even among top athletes. I have never coached an athlete who consistently pushed herself as hard as Isla.

Isla's improvement is easy to measure. From freshman to sophomore year, she bettered her 5k PR by three and a half minutes, and on the track, her 1600-meter time dropped from 5:45 to 5:21. Remarkably, within her freshman year alone, Isla went from missing out on making the team's top seven during cross country season to becoming the track team's overall Most Valuable Athlete. What the times and achievements don't show, though, is the complete dedication she has to giving her all every time she steps onto the track. She is the type of clutch athlete every coach trusts for critical situations, because you know she will always give her absolute best whether competing individually or contributing to a relay.

After suffering an injury this year that cut her sophomore cross country season short, Isla again proved her resilience and discipline. Instead of allowing the setback to discourage her, she joined the swim team and trained all winter to maintain fitness. When she came back for track season, she was stronger than ever.

In the classroom, Isla excels due to her work ethic, creativity, and determination. As her language arts teacher, I saw firsthand that she always completed assignments on time, achieved the highest marks in the class, and maintained a stellar GPA.

Isla has the resiliency and intrinsic motivation that will enable her to excel in the NCAA environment. She elevates not only her own performance, but also the performance of those around her. She genuinely celebrates others' successes, leads by example, and consistently demonstrates the maturity and selflessness that every coach wants in a team leader.

I wholeheartedly recommend Isla, not just as an exceptional runner, but also as an outstanding young woman. I am confident she will become a valuable member of any NCAA program fortunate enough to recruit her.

quote: She has improved more quickly than anyone I’ve ever coached, and all of that improvement comes down to her attitude, resolve, and competitive fire. I cannot wait to see how good she gets over the next two years and beyond. I don’t know what her limit is, but I know we’re nowhere close.
name: Jonathan McKenzie
title: Head Track & Cross Country Coach, Highlands High School | 2025–2027
fullLetter:
Isla has a number of qualities that make her an outstanding student-athlete, but her resolve to continue to improve is the quality that really stands out. She set a 20 second PR in the mile and immediately wanted to push to the next level. 

She’s receptive to coaching, responsible, beloved by teammates, and thrives on high stakes races and situations. She anchored our 4x800 every time we ran it, because her competitive spirit and drive worked perfectly in that spot. Put simply, she always wants to get faster, and she’s more than willing to do the work required. 

She has improved more quickly than anyone I’ve ever coached, and all of that improvement comes down to her attitude, resolve, and competitive fire. I cannot wait to see how good she gets over the next two years and beyond. I don’t know what her limit is, but I know we’re nowhere close.

quote: Isla challenged herself to accelerate her math coursework by taking both Advanced Geometry and Advanced AlgebraIl as a sophomore. I was continually impressed by her hard work, determination, and growth throughout the year, and I have no doubt she will continue to excel in her academic and career pursuits.
name: Elizabeth Winkler
title: Mathematics Teacher | Advanced Algebra II | 2025-2026
fullLetter: Isla challenged herself to accelerate her math coursework by taking both Advanced Geometry and Advanced AlgebraIl as a sophomore. I was continually impressed by her hard work, determination, and growth throughout the year, and I have no doubt she will continue to excel in her academic and career pursuits.

quote: She accepts critique with a mature mindset, welcomes adversity as an opportunity to get stronger, and brings a positive energy to the training environment.
name: Greg Tekulve
title: Owner | Tekulve Acceleration Sports Training
fullLetter:
“It is with great pleasure and distinct pride that I write this letter of recommendation for Isla Meyn, Class of 2028.
As her trainer at Tekulve Acceleration, I have had the privilege of witnessing her remarkable development as a Cross Country athlete. Throughout her time in our sports training program, Isla has demonstrated an elite work ethic, an unyielding desire to improve, and the mindset of a true competitor.

At Tekulve Acceleration, we utilize a rigorous, science-backed curriculum designed to optimize athletic performance. Isla trained on the exact same high-level program that we use to develop successful and dedicated collegiate and professional athletes. The physical and mental demands of this program are exceptionally high, requiring athletes to routinely push past their perceived comfort zones.
During our highly intense and strenuous workouts, Isla’s work ethic was never a question. Whether tackling explosive power training or enduring brutal metabolic conditioning, she approached every session with absolute focus. What truly stands out about Isla is her deliberate commitment to her craft; she showed a deep, maturity-driven desire to master her running mechanics and fine-tune her overall athletic abilities. Because of this dedication, she has achieved tremendous, tangible improvements in her stride efficiency, power output, and overall running economy.
Beyond her physical growth, Isla possesses the intangible qualities that define a leader. She accepts critique with a mature mindset, welcomes adversity as an opportunity to get stronger, and brings a positive energy to the training environment.

I have no doubt that the grit, discipline, and mechanical efficiency she refined at Tekulve Acceleration will serve her incredibly well at the next level. She has the physical foundation and the mental toughness to be an exceptional college athlete. I give Isla my highest endorsement without reservation.

Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information regarding her training progression or character.
